overall.description: A slow panoramic sweep across a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis at night, viewed from a high-rise vantage point. The scene features the iconic cylindrical '12' tower emerging from thick fog, flying vehicles traversing the sky, and streams of traffic flowing through neon-lit highways below. This is atmospheric game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showcasing dense urban architecture and volumetric fog effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise balcony overlooking cyberpunk highway interchange

events.description: flying vehicle cruises overhead from left to right through the fog

agents.ego_description: standing stationary on an elevated platform, slowly panning the camera right to survey the cityscape

notable_agents.action: flying car moves steadily across the foggy sky from left to right
ground traffic streams along the illuminated multi-level highways

entered.detail: dark silhouette of adjacent massive high-rise building framing the left side
distant industrial towers with red warning lights piercing through the thick fog
multi-level highway interchange with streaming red and white vehicle lights
massive cylindrical skyscraper with bright white illuminated '12' signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from a high balcony, the left side dominated by a dark adjacent building. Through the fog, distant industrial towers with red lights are visible. As the camera pans right, the iconic cylindrical tower marked with '12' emerges from the fog, becoming the central focus. Flying vehicles cruise overhead while traffic flows continuously on the neon-lit highways far below.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic view of downtown cyberpunk district with central megatower

events.description: second flying vehicle emerges from fog on the right and crosses toward center

agents.ego_description: continuing the slow rightward pan, maintaining focus on the tower 12 structure as it moves through center frame

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle hovers briefly then moves leftward across the skyline

entered.detail: cluster of illuminated glass skyscrapers emerging from the fog on the right horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera continues panning right, keeping the '12' tower centered as it transitions from the right to the left side of the frame. The left building and distant industrial towers exit view, replaced by an emerging skyline of glass skyscrapers on the right. A flying vehicle crosses the frame from right to left, adding motion to the foggy atmospheric scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: extended cityscape view with tower 12 on periphery

agents.ego_description: completing the panoramic sweep, focusing on the dense urban architecture to the right of tower 12

entered.detail: tightly packed high-rise buildings with various neon signs and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the '12' tower moves to the left edge of the frame as the camera reveals the dense urban cluster to the right. The panoramic view showcases the sprawling extent of the cyberpunk city, with multiple flying vehicles visible in the distance. The fog persists, creating a moody atmosphere with neon lights diffused through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous panoramic sweep from a high-rise balcony that transitions from a secluded architectural corner into a sprawling view of a neon-lit cyberpunk skyline. It begins with a dark adjacent building framing the left side, moving right to reveal distant industrial towers with red lights before the iconic cylindrical tower marked with 12 emerges from the thick fog. As the camera continues its rightward glide, the tower shifts across the frame, causing the initial industrial structures to exit view while a new cluster of glass skyscrapers begins to rise on the right. The scene then expands further, pushing the tower toward the left edge to fully unveil a dense urban expanse where flying vehicles cruise through a moody, haze-filled atmosphere. Finally, the view settles on the vast scale of the city, with diffused neon lights shimmering through the persistent fog across the distant horizon.
